fixture_name: AI_OS static prototype layout fixture draft

top_status_bar.purpose: Show system status, validator state, protected-file status, and critical alerts first.

left_navigation.purpose: Provide static navigation labels for dashboard regions.

center_analytics_region.purpose: Show fixture-only daily analytics, repo health, and validator summary widgets.

right_alerts_region.purpose: Show alert hierarchy, warning explanations, and review-required items.

lower_trading_readiness_region.purpose: Show trading readiness boundary state without broker execution or live trading controls.

morning_brief_region.purpose: Show fixture-only Morning Brief preview concepts.

assistant_guide_region.purpose: Show non-blocking voice guide and operator help concepts.

next_safe_action_region.purpose: Show the next safe action for human review.
